channel.title: PR Newswire: Press Release Distribution, Targeting, Monitoring and Marketing
channel.description: PR Newswire's news distribution, targeting, monitoring and marketing solutions help you connect and engage with target audiences across the globe.

item.title: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: VRTX) Announces Acquisition of Precision BioSciences for $4.1 Billion
item.description: BOSTON, March 12, 2026 -- Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated (NASDAQ: VRTX) today announced it has entered into a definitive merger agreement to acquire Precision BioSciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: DTIL) for approximately $4.1 billion in an all-cash transaction.

item.title: Delta Air Lines Reports Strong February Traffic Results
item.description: ATLANTA, March 12, 2026 -- Delta Air Lines (NYSE: DAL) today reported operating results for the month of February 2026. System-wide traffic increased 8.2% compared to February 2025.

item.title: SolarTech Inc Announces Restructuring Plan and Workforce Reduction
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif., March 12, 2026 -- SolarTech Inc ($SLRT) today announced a restructuring plan to reduce its global workforce by approximately 2,000 positions, representing about 15% of total employees.
